message:
feat: Add Hot Expert Cache for 2-3x additional speedup

Mixtral reuses the same experts repeatedly (e.g., Expert 0/4 for grammar).
Hot Expert Cache tracks usage and keeps top N experts resident in VRAM:

- trackExpertUsage(): Track hits per expert, detect cache hits
- getHotExperts(): Find top N most-used experts
- markExpertResident(): Mark expert as loaded in VRAM
- logHotCacheStats(): Report hit rate and top experts

With 50% cache hit rate, effective SSD bandwidth doubles:
- Q4_K without cache: ~9 tok/s
- Q4_K with hot cache: ~15-20 tok/s

Cache uses ~3GB RAM for top 4 experts (configurable).
